name: ngx-theme-stack
description: A stack of themes for Angular applications.

scripts.postbuild: copyfiles schematics/*/schema.json schematics/*/files/** schematics/collection.json ../../dist/ngx-theme-stack/ && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),dir='../../dist/ngx-theme-stack/schematics';fs.readdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}).forEach(f=>{if(f.endsWith('.js')){const o=path.join(dir,f);fs.renameSync(o,o.slice(0,-3)+'.cjs');}});" && printf "# Nested package.json's are only needed for development.\n**/package.json\n" > ../../dist/ngx-theme-stack/.npmignore
